items.title: This AMD-powered 15-inch Alienware 165Hz gaming laptop is a great starter machine at $849 (Save $451)
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Walmart that drops an AMD-powered Alienware 15-inch gaming laptop down to $849 shipped. That’s a straight-up $451 discount on its $1,300 usual going rate, making it a lot easier on your wallet. While this isn’t the latest model on the market, it still makes for a compelling entry-level gaming laptop for casual players or anyone looking to jump into esports titles that don’t demand the latest hardware. Considering similarly equipped previous-gen gaming notebooks are still selling for over $1,000, this Alienware machine offers some serious value for your money. Head below for more details.

items.title: Just $15 today gets you Anker’s 4-foot 140W USB-C cable that charges two devices at the same time
items.summary:
Anker 4-foot 2-in-1 140W USB-C Cable

Buy for $15 (Reg. $18)

What we love

Need to power two devices from a single USB-C charger? This Anker cable is built for exactly that. It takes one USB-C connection and splits it into dual USB-C outputs, featuring a single input on one end and two connectors on the other. It can deliver up to 140W when charging a single device, or intelligently distribute power between two connected devices as required.
